overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character climbing a neon-lit industrial ladder to emerge on a rain-soaked rooftop plaza, then traversing through a dystopian cityscape with towering corporate buildings and neon-lit overpasses at night.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial maintenance shaft with neon-lit ladder

events.description: character reaches top of ladder and exits into bright light at rooftop level

agents.ego_description: climbing a vertical metal ladder flanked by glowing red neon strips in a dark industrial shaft

entered.detail: large curved metal piping running along the left wall of the shaft
vertical ladder with glowing red neon edges illuminating the climb
yellow metal rungs of the ladder being climbed
black and yellow diagonal warning stripes on the ladder sides

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person perspective climbing a vertical ladder in a dark, enclosed industrial shaft. Red neon lights line the edges of the ladder, casting a crimson glow on the metal rungs and surrounding pipes as the character ascends toward a bright light at the top.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop plaza in front of corporate mega-building

agents.ego_description: walking across the wet concrete plaza while observing the massive illuminated building with red spires

entered.detail: massive skyscraper with multiple red illuminated spires and glass facade dominating the skyline
yellow construction vehicle parked near the plaza edge with its arm extended
wet reflective concrete surface of the rooftop plaza with puddles
elevated highway or walkway structure visible to the right of the plaza

segments.scene_description: Having exited the ladder, the character stands on a vast rain-soaked rooftop plaza facing an imposing corporate mega-building with glowing red spires. The area is sparsely populated with construction equipment visible to the left and an overpass structure to the right, while the wet concrete reflects the ambient city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street beneath elevated highway with neon signage

events.description: descending from the plaza onto the city street level with elevated highway overhead
pedestrian crosses the street from right to left in front of the character

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet asphalt road passing under neon-lit overpasses and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing crossing the street from right to left
large military-style truck driving along the road and passing by

entered.detail: massive concrete highway structure with red underlighting spanning across the street
large illuminated advertising signs with red and blue neon text in Asian characters
glowing digital displays showing advertisements on building walls
dark green military vehicle parked on the right side of the road

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the plaza down to street level, walking along a wet asphalt road beneath a massive elevated highway overpass illuminated with red neon lights. Digital billboards and advertising screens line the street while a pedestrian crosses the road and a military truck drives past, creating a dense cyberpunk urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person ascent from a claustrophobic industrial shaft into the expansive, rain-slicked depths of a neon-lit dystopian city. It begins with a vertical climb up a metal ladder in a dark enclosure, where red neon lights cast a crimson glow on surrounding pipes as the camera moves toward a bright opening above. As the character exits the shaft, the scene opens onto a vast, wet rooftop plaza dominated by an imposing corporate mega-building with glowing red spires and reflective concrete. The camera then descends from the heights to street level, transitioning from the open plaza to a dense urban corridor beneath a massive elevated highway. Finally, the movement continues along a wet asphalt road lined with digital billboards and passing military traffic, fully immersing the viewer in the oppressive atmosphere of the cyberpunk cityscape.
